markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration and share insights on AI-powered contact center solutions and content generation.](https://fathom.video/share/xPVw9otZcsvwYRzvKy11VUfzyJUD55Ku?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Justin's company, Relay Hawk, is developing AI agents for outsourced call centers, facing challenges in market adoption and scaling.](https://fathom.video/share/xPVw9otZcsvwYRzvKy11VUfzyJUD55Ku?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Marcel's company, growthx.ai, has successfully scaled AI-powered content generation services with a focus on high-quality outputs and efficient human-AI collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/xPVw9otZcsvwYRzvKy11VUfzyJUD55Ku?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Both discussed the importance of solving for revenue, potentially pivoting business models, and the complexities of AI evaluation and fine-tuning.](https://fathom.video/share/xPVw9otZcsvwYRzvKy11VUfzyJUD55Ku?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Marcel suggested more aggressive strategies for Justin to drive adoption and revenue, including potentially acquiring a small call center or buying out specific customer contracts.](https://fathom.video/share/xPVw9otZcsvwYRzvKy11VUfzyJUD55Ku?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)

## Topics

### Relay Hawk's Business Model and Challenges

  - [Developing AI agents for outsourced call centers, particularly in the answering services market ($1.5B industry)](https://fathom.video/share/xPVw9otZcsvwYRzvKy11VUfzyJUD55Ku?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Charging per minute for AI agent usage, with upfront credit purchases for cash flow](https://fathom.video/share/xPVw9otZcsvwYRzvKy11VUfzyJUD55Ku?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)
  - [Facing slow adoption from existing call centers due to fear of revenue loss](https://fathom.video/share/xPVw9otZcsvwYRzvKy11VUfzyJUD55Ku?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
  - [Considering pivot to becoming a full-service AI-powered call center](https://fathom.video/share/xPVw9otZcsvwYRzvKy11VUfzyJUD55Ku?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)

### growthx.ai's Success and Approach

  - [Scaled to $10M+ revenue, 70 employees, bootstrapped then raised Series A](https://fathom.video/share/xPVw9otZcsvwYRzvKy11VUfzyJUD55Ku?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
  - [Focus on solving complex, "messy" problems in content generation for high-value clients](https://fathom.video/share/xPVw9otZcsvwYRzvKy11VUfzyJUD55Ku?tab=summary&timestamp=1504.0)
  - [Developed a platform with coding agents, workflow engines, and evaluation systems](https://fathom.video/share/xPVw9otZcsvwYRzvKy11VUfzyJUD55Ku?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
  - [70% gross margins on primarily service-based revenue model](https://fathom.video/share/xPVw9otZcsvwYRzvKy11VUfzyJUD55Ku?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)

### AI Evaluation and Quality Assurance

  - [Relay Hawk: Post-conversation evals and synthetic data generation for testing](https://fathom.video/share/xPVw9otZcsvwYRzvKy11VUfzyJUD55Ku?tab=summary&timestamp=2365.0)
  - [growthx.ai: Multi-step evaluation process including fact-checking, quality assessment, and human editing evaluation](https://fathom.video/share/xPVw9otZcsvwYRzvKy11VUfzyJUD55Ku?tab=summary&timestamp=2496.0)
  - [Both exploring ways to make evaluation more objective and efficient](https://fathom.video/share/xPVw9otZcsvwYRzvKy11VUfzyJUD55Ku?tab=summary&timestamp=2496.0)

### Fine-tuning and Model Optimization

  - [Discussion on potential benefits of fine-tuning models to reduce context bloat and improve efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/xPVw9otZcsvwYRzvKy11VUfzyJUD55Ku?tab=summary&timestamp=2872.0)
  - [Importance of structuring data collection for potential future fine-tuning efforts](https://fathom.video/share/xPVw9otZcsvwYRzvKy11VUfzyJUD55Ku?tab=summary&timestamp=3031.0)

### Market Strategy and Revenue Generation

  - [Marcel advised Justin to be more aggressive in approach, potentially buying out specific customer contracts or acquiring a small call center](https://fathom.video/share/xPVw9otZcsvwYRzvKy11VUfzyJUD55Ku?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)
  - [Emphasis on solving for revenue first, then optimizing technology and processes](https://fathom.video/share/xPVw9otZcsvwYRzvKy11VUfzyJUD55Ku?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Justin to consider more aggressive strategies for driving adoption and revenue, including potential acquisitions or contract buyouts](https://fathom.video/share/xPVw9otZcsvwYRzvKy11VUfzyJUD55Ku?tab=summary&timestamp=2028.0)
  - [Explore fine-tuning possibilities for Relay Hawk's AI models to improve efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/xPVw9otZcsvwYRzvKy11VUfzyJUD55Ku?tab=summary&timestamp=2872.0)
  - [Justin to refine Relay Hawk's value proposition to emphasize improved customer experience, not just cost-cutting](https://fathom.video/share/xPVw9otZcsvwYRzvKy11VUfzyJUD55Ku?tab=summary&timestamp=1564.0)
  - [Potential follow-up on AI evaluation techniques, with Marcel offering to connect Justin with growthx.ai's CTO for further discussion](https://fathom.video/share/xPVw9otZcsvwYRzvKy11VUfzyJUD55Ku?tab=summary&timestamp=2330.0)
